title: Old Sounds for Doors,Trapdoors and Fencegates
description: Brings Back Old Sounds for Doors,Trapdoors and Fencegates
body:
![Mario](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04fce9b1188f7e905dbfcf959016ac216130287b.png)
# **Old Sounds – Classic Doors, Trapdoors & Gates Resourse Pack**
🔊 Bring back the sounds you remember.
This resource pack restores the original pre-1.9 sounds for wooden doors, trapdoors, and fence gates — perfect for players who miss the classic clicks and clunks of early Minecraft.

Whether you're building a retro map, using old-school textures, or just craving that nostalgic audio, this pack brings the OG vibes right back to your ears.

🎧 Features:
✅ Restores classic wooden door, trapdoor & fence gate sounds

✅ Vanilla-friendly — no mods needed

✅ Fully compatible with modern Minecraft versions

✅ Lightweight and easy to install

📦 How to Install:
Drop the .zip into your resourcepacks folder

Enable it in the Resource Packs menu

Enjoy the throwback sounds!

🎮 Minecraft Versions: 1.14 Plus (Older Versions already have the old Sounds)
💬 Simple. Nostalgic. Just like the old days.
